If(gblIsPMO Or gblStakeholderGroup = ThisItem.StakeholderGroup.Value,
  DisplayMode.Edit,
  DisplayMode.View
)

If(gblIsPMO Or gblStakeholderGroup = ThisItem.StakeholderGroup.Value,
  DisplayMode.Edit,
  DisplayMode.View
)
